title: CommentRequest

user.description: The author of the Comment, if the author is a User. If the third party does not support specifying an author, we will append "[Posted on behalf of {name}]" to the comment.

contact.description: The author of the Comment, if the author is a Contact.If the third party does not support specifying an author, we will append "[Posted on behalf of {name}]" to the comment.

html_body.description: The comment's text body formatted as html.

ticket.description: The ticket associated with the comment.

is_private.description: Whether or not the comment is internal.

description:
# The Comment Object
### Description
The `Comment` object is used to represent a comment on a ticket.
